title: Tarik Skubal Begins Rehab, Potential Reinstatement Imminent for MLB Pitcher
body:
In a significant development for the Detroit Tigers, their star pitcher Tarik Skubal is poised to take a major step towards returning to the mound. After a period of recovery, Skubal is scheduled to embark on a rehab assignment, with his first appearance slated for Sunday. This update, shared by Tigers manager A.J. Hinch, comes as welcome news for the team and its fans, who have been eagerly awaiting the ace's return. Given the pace of his progress, it's possible that Skubal could be back in the Tigers' lineup after just one rehab start, a remarkably quick turnaround for the two-time reigning American League Cy Young winner.

The road to recovery has been a swift one for Skubal, who has been working diligently to regain his strength and form. His impending rehab assignment marks a crucial milestone in this process, as it will provide a tangible opportunity for him to test his skills in a game setting. By doing so, Skubal will be able to gauge his readiness to rejoin the Tigers and contribute to the team's efforts. The fact that he may only require one rehab start before being reinstated is a testament to his dedication and the effectiveness of his rehabilitation program.

For the Tigers, Skubal's return would be a significant boost to their pitching rotation. As one of the most dominant forces in the American League, his presence on the mound is a game-changer. Skubal's ability to consistently deliver high-quality starts has been a key factor in the team's success in recent years. His absence, while manageable, has undoubtedly been felt, and his return would help to bolster the Tigers' chances of competing at a high level. With Skubal back in the fold, the team's pitching staff would regain a sense of depth and stability, allowing them to better navigate the challenges of the season.

The timing of Skubal's return is also noteworthy, as it coincides with a critical juncture in the season. As the campaign enters its latter stages, the Tigers will be looking to make a push for the playoffs. With Skubal back on the mound, they would be well-equipped to make a strong run, leveraging his exceptional talent to drive their success. Furthermore, his return would also have a positive impact on the team's morale, as his teammates would be buoyed by the knowledge that they have one of the best pitchers in the league back in their corner.

As Skubal prepares to take the next step in his rehabilitation, all eyes will be on his performance. His rehab start on Sunday will be closely watched, with fans and pundits alike eager to assess his form and readiness to return to the majors. While there are still variables at play, the signs are encouraging, and it's possible that Skubal could be back in the Tigers' lineup sooner rather than later. If he is indeed able to return after just one rehab start, it would be a remarkable achievement, and a testament to his hard work and resilience.

Looking ahead, the prospect of Skubal's return is a tantalizing one for the Tigers and their fans. As the team navigates the twists and turns of the season, they will be buoyed by the knowledge that their star pitcher is on the cusp of returning. With Skubal back on the mound, the Tigers will be a force to be reckoned with, and their chances of success will be significantly enhanced. As the season unfolds, all eyes will be on Skubal, as he seeks to regain his dominance and lead the Tigers to greatness. The future looks bright, and the impending return of their ace pitcher is a major reason why.
